0
+
iCloud+
Upgrade
, iCloud+
Create unique party invitations for life’s most exciting moments with Apple Invites.
Learn more
iCloud+
One powerfully connected experience.
Upgrade today
iCloud is built into every Apple device. It keeps your photos, videos, notes, and more safe, automatically backed up, and available anywhere you go — with 5GB of storage for free. When you upgrade to iCloud+, you get even more storage, unique party invitations with Apple Invites, and enhanced privacy features that protect you and your data. It’s all the power of iCloud. Plus.
1
iCloud+
$0.99
/month
per month
50GB
Storage for
thousands of photos, videos, and files.
Upgrade
iCloud+
$2.99
/month
per month
200GB
Great for family
sharing or larger media libraries.
Upgrade
iCloud+
$9.99
/month
per month
2TB
Plenty of space for all
the family’s photos, videos, and files.
Upgrade
Every iCloud+ plan includes
Apple Invites, iCloud Private Relay, Hide My Email, Custom Email Domain, and HomeKit Secure Video. And additional plans have even more storage.
Compare all plans
Everything
that matters.
Saved and sound.
iCloud Photos
keeps a lifetime of your original high-resolution photos and videos securely stored and protected in iCloud — with lightweight space-saving versions on all your devices. So whether it’s a video of your puppy at the beach taken yesterday or a photo of your friends years ago, your entire collection is accessible and shareable no matter where you are.
Shared Photo Library
is the best way to seamlessly share the photos and videos you want with up to five other people. Shared library content appears in Featured Photos and Memories so you can relive your adventures using photos everyone took.
Shared Albums
makes it easy to share the photos you want with the people you choose, like combining your road trip photos with your friends’ photos or keeping family updated on the kids’ adventures. The people you share the album with are notified whenever it’s updated, and everyone can add their own photos, videos, and comments over time.
iCloud Drive
makes the files and folders you save easy to get to and share, no matter which device you’re using. Access them all from the Files app on iOS and iPadOS, the Finder on your Mac, File Explorer for Windows PCs, or iCloud.com.
iCloud Backup
keeps important data on your iPhone and iPad, including all your favorite apps, automatically backed up whenever your device is connected to power and Wi-Fi — so your backup is always up to date.
2
Restore
your device or set up a new one from your iCloud backup to seamlessly bring along all your photos, files, contacts, apps, settings, and more, so it looks just like your previous one.
Your everyday essentials, available everywhere.
iCloud.com
has been redesigned so you can easily view, manage, and edit what you have stored in iCloud on any device. And with the iCloud for Windows app, you can access photos and files you’ve saved to iCloud directly from your PC.
Visit iCloud.com
Notes.
Jot down a quick to-do list on your Mac and open it on your iPhone while you’re out and about.
Calendar.
Keep track of your schedule on the go and share events like book club meet-ups, soccer practices, and spring break plans with friends and family.
Photos.
View, edit, and share photos and videos from anywhere, on any device.
Safari.
Your tabs and bookmarks stay up to date automatically, so you can switch devices and pick up your online shopping or school research project right where you left off.
Passwords and Keychain.
Securely store your passwords and use AutoFill to make signing in to your favorite apps and websites simple.
Contacts.
Phone numbers and email addresses of your friends and family are kept in sync, so it’s easy to reach out to anyone from any device.
Easily collaborate and share
files, folders, documents, and more while you’re on the go. Just send a private link and control whether others can view, share, or edit the work. And with live updates, you can see edits as they’re being made.
More privacy.
More protection.
More peace of mind.
iCloud Private Relay
takes your privacy to the next level when browsing with Safari. It’s designed to prevent websites and network providers from building a profile about you based on your IP address, location, and browsing history. Just turn it on and you’re instantly protected.
3
Learn how Private Relay protects
your privacy online (PDF)
Generated email:
stapled.11.rueful@icloud.com
Generated email:
11lattes_besties@icloud.com
Generated email:
golfer_11orbital@icloud.com
Hide My Email
lets you generate unique, random email addresses that automatically forward to your personal inbox — and even let you reply — so you don’t have to share your real email address when filling out a form on the web or signing up for a newsletter.
HomeKit Secure Video
enables activity detected by your security cameras to be recorded, analyzed on your home hub device, and uploaded to iCloud so you can view it in the Home app from anywhere. Footage is end-to-end encrypted, so you can trust that your video is always private and that only the people you choose can access it.
4
See compatible security cameras
Stay connected.
From small stuff
to big events.
Apple Invites
is a new way to create unique invitations for your biggest moments. Pick a background or use Apple Intelligence to generate an image and design your invitation. Use Apple Music, Photos, Maps, and more to bring your event to life. Then send it to all your guests and track their RSVPs. It’s everything you need to get the party started, and it’s included in your iCloud+ subscription.
Learn more
iCloud Mail
is seamlessly integrated with the Mail app on your iPhone, iPad, or Mac, and iCloud.com makes it easy to send and receive email from anywhere. Security features like spam protection and antiphishing are built in to detect and block junk mail before it reaches your inbox. It’s simple to set up your own @icloud.com email address, and when you subscribe to iCloud+, you’ll be able to personalize your email with a custom domain.
Messages
keeps you in control of your conversations with the ability to edit, give Tapbacks, and undo sent messages. When you sync Messages in iCloud, your conversations always go smoothly since every message is backed up, end‑to‑end encrypted, and kept in sync across all your devices.
Text message reading:
Hey, you still there?
Text message reading:
One sec.
Moving to my iPhone.
Replay
Choose the plan
that’s right for you.
All iCloud+ plans can be shared with your family.
Upgrade to iCloud+

Quick Links
If you forgot your Apple Account password
If you forgot your iPhone passcode or your iPhone is disabled
If you want to cancel a subscription from Apple
Update your iPhone or iPad
Find your lost Apple device
0
+
iCloud Support
Reset your Apple Account password
You sign in to iCloud with your Apple Account. If you forgot the password, learn how to reset it.
Learn how to reset your password
Manage iCloud+
Get more storage and extra features when you upgrade to iCloud+.
Learn how to upgrade
Learn how to downgrade or cancel
Back up your device
Back up your iPhone with iCloud or your computer in case your device is ever replaced, lost, or damaged.
Choose a backup method
Learn about what iCloud backs up
Restore your device from a backup
You can restore your iPhone, iPad, or Vision Pro from an iCloud backup to pick up right where you left off.
Learn how to restore your device
Watch a video about restoring your device
Free up space in iCloud
You can choose which data is stored in iCloud, and learn how to make more space available.
Make more space available in iCloud
Check your iCloud storage
Get started
Sign in on your devices
To set up iCloud on your devices, just sign in to each of them with the same Apple Account.
Learn how to get set up
Store files in iCloud Drive
You can store files and folders in iCloud Drive and access them from your iPhone, iPad, Mac, or PC, and on
iCloud.com
.
Learn about iCloud Drive
Turn on iCloud Keychain
With iCloud Keychain, you can keep passwords and other secure information updated across your devices.
Learn about iCloud Keychain
Set up iCloud Photos
iCloud Photos works with the Photos app to keep your photos and videos securely stored in iCloud, and up to date across your devices and on
iCloud.com
.
Learn about iCloud Photos
Your guide to iCloud
iCloud User Guide
Learn about all the ways to use iCloud to store and access your files, photos, and more.
Browse the iCloud User Guide
Learn how to use iCloud.com
iCloud for Windows User Guide
You can access your iCloud photos, files, passwords, and more on your Windows computer.
Learn about iCloud for Windows

hits.title: iCloud Drive silently deletes your content
How Apple’s iCloud Drive deletes your files without warning
iCloud Uploads Local Data Outside of iCloud Drive
iCloud Drive can strip metadata from documents
Cloudy with a Chance of Insanity: Unsticking iCloud Drive
macOS Sonoma 14.4 Bug 'Destroys Saved Versions in iCloud Drive'
Serious bug in Sonoma 14.4 will destroy saved versions in iCloud Drive
macOS Sonoma 14.4 Bug 'Destroys Saved Versions in iCloud Drive'

analysis.name: iCloud Drive
analysis.tagline: Easily view and share all your files stored in iCloud on any device and on the web.
analysis.value_proposition: Apple's built-in cloud file storage that syncs files and folders across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Windows, and the web.
analysis.ideal_customer: Apple device users and families wanting seamless cross-device file sync and backup

features.name: file storage
features.description: Store files and folders in the cloud accessible from all devices
features.evidence_quote: makes the files and folders you save easy to get to and share, no matter which device you're using

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Share files stored in iCloud from any device or the web
features.evidence_quote: Easily view and share all your files stored in iCloud on any device and on the web.

features.name: cross-device sync
features.description: Files sync across iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Windows PCs
features.evidence_quote: store files and folders in iCloud Drive and access them from your iPhone, iPad, Mac, or PC

features.name: web access
features.description: Access files via iCloud.com in any browser
features.evidence_quote: Access them all from the Files app on iOS and iPadOS, the Finder on your Mac, File Explorer for Windows PCs, or iCloud.com.

features.name: finder integration
features.description: Native integration with macOS Finder
features.evidence_quote: Finder on your Mac

features.name: windows integration
features.description: iCloud for Windows client integrates with File Explorer
features.evidence_quote: You can access your iCloud photos, files, passwords, and more on your Windows computer.

features.name: files app integration
features.description: Native Files app integration on iOS and iPadOS
features.evidence_quote: Access them all from the Files app on iOS and iPadOS

features.name: icloud photos
features.description: Cloud-based photo library sync with space-saving local versions
features.evidence_quote: keeps a lifetime of your original high-resolution photos and videos securely stored and protected in iCloud

features.name: shared photo library
features.description: Shared photo library with up to five other people
features.evidence_quote: the best way to seamlessly share the photos and videos you want with up to five other people

features.name: shared albums
features.description: Share photo albums with selected people who can add photos and comments
features.evidence_quote: makes it easy to share the photos you want with the people you choose

features.name: device backup
features.description: Automatic iPhone and iPad backup when connected to power and Wi-Fi
features.evidence_quote: keeps important data on your iPhone and iPad, including all your favorite apps, automatically backed up

features.name: device restore
features.description: Restore device or set up new device from iCloud backup
features.evidence_quote: Restore your device or set up a new one from your iCloud backup

features.name: icloud keychain
features.description: Cross-device password and secure info sync
features.evidence_quote: With iCloud Keychain, you can keep passwords and other secure information updated across your devices.

features.name: icloud private relay
features.description: Privacy feature that hides web browsing activity
features.evidence_quote: Every iCloud+ plan includes Apple Invites, iCloud Private Relay, Hide My Email

features.name: hide my email
features.description: Generate unique random email addresses that forward to your inbox
features.evidence_quote: Every iCloud+ plan includes Apple Invites, iCloud Private Relay, Hide My Email

features.name: custom email domain
features.description: Use your own email domain with iCloud Mail
features.evidence_quote: Custom Email Domain

features.name: homekit secure video
features.description: Secure cloud storage for HomeKit-enabled security cameras
features.evidence_quote: HomeKit Secure Video

features.name: apple invites
features.description: Create and share party invitations
features.evidence_quote: Create unique party invitations for life's most exciting moments with Apple Invites.

features.name: family sharing
features.description: Share storage plans and content with family members
features.evidence_quote: Great for family sharing or larger media libraries.

features.name: notes sync
features.description: Sync notes across devices via iCloud
features.evidence_quote: It keeps your photos, videos, notes, and more safe

features.name: end-to-end encryption
features.description: Advanced Data Protection for end-to-end encrypted iCloud data
features.evidence_quote: enhanced privacy features that protect you and your data

features.name: file versioning
features.description: Saved versions of documents stored in iCloud Drive
features.evidence_quote: macOS Sonoma 14.4 Bug 'Destroys Saved Versions in iCloud Drive'

tiers.name: iCloud+ 50GB
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50GB storage for thousands of photos, videos, and files; Private Relay; Hide My Email; Custom Domain; HomeKit Secure Video

tiers.name: iCloud+ 200GB
tiers.headline_inclusions: 200GB, great for family sharing or larger media libraries

tiers.name: iCloud+ 2TB
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2TB for all the family's photos, videos, and files

pricing.notes: Non-seat-based flat storage tiers; 5GB free with any Apple Account; additional larger tiers (6TB, 12TB) exist but not shown in extracted copy; part of Apple One bundle
